ai-tinkerers-san-francisco.notes: Global community founded by Joe Heitzeberg after Nat Friedman tweet in Sep 2022. First meetup Nov 2022 in Seattle with 12 people. Name coined by Alex Graveley. Now 99,000+ members across 214 cities.

aicamp-sf-bay-area.notes: Founded by Bill Liu in August 2015. Global platform with 500K+ developer members in 100+ countries.

cerebral-valley.notes: First event March 2023 originated from Eric Newcomer's bachelor party. Invite-only, 300+ attendees. Also publishes newsletter on Beehiiv.

agi-house.cadence: weekly to multiple times per week
agi-house.notes: Launched Feb 1, 2023 by Rocky Yu. Located in $68M Hillsborough mansion plus SF Twin Peaks location. Merit-based access, never charges.

mlops-community-san-francisco.notes: Founded by Demetrios Brinkmann March-April 2020. Global community 75K+ ML practitioners. Slack 21K+ members. 37 cities.

latent-space.notes: Newsletter started 2022, podcast launched Feb 23, 2023. 200K+ subscribers, 10M+ annual readers. Top 10 US tech podcast.

the-ai-collective.cadence: multiple times per week across chapters
the-ai-collective.notes: Formerly 'The GenAI Collective', rebranded June 2025. 200K+ members across 100+ global chapters. 350+ organizers. Non-profit.

sf-python.notes: Founded November 2008 by Grace Law. Largest, longest-running community-run meetup in SF Bay Area. 13,266 members. Annual PyBay conference.

house-of-ai.notes: 6,000 sq ft AI coworking space and event venue at 40 Boardman Pl, SoMa, SF. Built by bepurple.ai team.

bay-area-ai.notes: Described as longest-running AI meetup in the world. 5,546 members. Khrabrov is AI Community Architect at Neo4j.

sf-bayarea-ml.notes: Founded April 21, 2011. 7,208+ members. 66 past events. Appears less active recently.

san-francisco-ai-engineers.notes: Run by Fonzi talent marketplace. 3,399 members. Events at House of AI. Also runs New York chapter.

the-ai-salon-sf.notes: Founded December 7, 2022. Focuses on meaning and societal impact of AI. Expanded to 6 cities across 3 continents.

stanford-ai-alignment.notes: Stanford Existential Risks Initiative sub-group. Born spring 2022. Programs: AI War Gaming, AI Policy lectures, ARENA upskilling.

bair-berkeley-ai-research.notes: UC Berkeley academic AI research lab. Runs BAIR Commons program. Publishes BAIR Blog.
